arts.ttl: Inter Milan looking to sign Arsenal player on the cheap – Plan in the works
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has been a bit-part player for Arsenal this season. The Ukrainian has made 13 appearances in all competitions, playing a little over 400 minutes. He has remained on the bench in the club’s last two games. As his game time continues to reduce at Arsenal, Zinchenko’s future is therefore under some question. arts.ttl: Champions League | Inter v Monaco: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Inter Milan prepare for their crucial Champions League encounter against AS Monaco, manager Simone Inzaghi faces some tactical decisions and injury challenges. The Nerazzurri, coming off a match against a lower-ranked opponent, took the opportunity to rotate their squad, giving rest to key players like Nicolo Barella and Federico Dimarco. Yann Bisseck, recently returned to the matchday squad, was also given additional recovery time.
